/usr/bin/c++ "CMakeFiles/mh-compressor-manager.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mh-compressor-manager.dir/config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mh-compressor-manager.dir/compressor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mh-compressor-manager.dir/monitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mh-compressor-manager.dir/logger.cpp.o" -o mh-compressor-manager  -lz -lbrotlienc -lbrotlicommon -lsystemd -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0
